name: IEEE 6-Units ELD Test System No.1
source: Al-Roomi Economic Load Dispatch Test Systems Repository
fuel_cost_form: C_i(P_i) = a_i + b_i * P_i + c_i * P_i^2
notes: Simplified version: only quadratic cost, P bounds, and power balance constraint.
Transmission losses, valve-point effects, ramp-rate limits and prohibited zones are ignored in this experiment.
